[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001100 3
1 010011011 5
2 111111111 a
3 110110001 5
4 111001100 5
5 011111011 7
6 111111111 a
7 110110001 5
